shortDescription.default: Time-Off (PTO) showcase: view balances, request leave, and manage team approvals inside Microsoft 365 Copilot.

longDescription.default: My Time Off is a SharePoint Framework Copilot Components sample. It surfaces an employee's PTO inside Microsoft 365 Copilot as three interactive components — a personal overview, a request experience with a live Outlook calendar conflict check, and a team view with inline manager approvals. It showcases authenticated client-side API calls: every component reads and writes its data with the signed-in user's own delegated identity, calling SharePoint REST and Microsoft Graph directly from the browser, with no MCP server or middle tier.

features.title: time-off Feature
features.description: The feature that activates elements of the time-off solution.
